name: spec-ui
description: Compile structured markdown specs into deterministic, portable HTML prototypes.

scripts.compile:example: node bin/spec-ui.mjs compile examples/task-board.md --out artifacts/task-board.html --ir artifacts/task-board.ir.json
scripts.compile:saas: node bin/spec-ui.mjs compile examples/saas-dashboard.md --out artifacts/saas-dashboard.html --ir artifacts/saas-dashboard.ir.json
scripts.compile:marketing: node bin/spec-ui.mjs compile examples/marketing-landing.md --out artifacts/marketing-landing.html --ir artifacts/marketing-landing.ir.json
